card.title: Sleep
card.description: Sleep is formulated to help calm the mind and body, supporting the natural transition into restful sleep. This blend combines magnesium glycinate and glycine to promote relaxation, while lemon balm and tart cherry provide gentle botanical support for circadian rhythm balance. L-theanine and PharmaGABA® work synergistically to quiet mental chatter and ease tension, helping you fall asleep more peacefully and wake up restored.
card.finePrint: These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any di... Read more

benefits.title: Enhance Sleep Quality
benefits.description: Supports deeper, more restorative rest with magnesium glycinate, glycine, and tart cherry to improve recovery and overall well-being.

benefits.title: Promote Relaxation
benefits.description: A calming blend of lemon balm, L-theanine, and PharmaGABA® helps ease stress and quiet the mind for a smoother transition into sleep.

benefits.title: Support Sleep-Wake Cycles
benefits.description: Tart cherry provides natural melatonin precursors to help align circadian rhythms, supporting a balanced and healthy sleep cycle.

splitContent.title: Sleep like you mean it
splitContent.subTitle: Wake up refreshed and recharged with this synergistic blend of minerals, amino acids, and calming botanicals.
features: Encourages mental clarity and a positive mood

quotes.quote: “Sleep has completely changed my nights for the better. Since I started taking it, I’ve experienced a significant improvement in the quality of my rest. The curated ingredients help me relax and drift off effortlessly. The best part is I stay asleep through the night! I’ve also noticed that it doesn’t make me drowsy the next day, and my stress levels are lower.”
quotes.author: Kate F.
